dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6616 IH: Clean Water Justice Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Barragán introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure, and in addition to the Committee on the Judiciary, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Water Pollution Control Act to increase certain criminal fines, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Clean Water Justice Act.
Section 309(c)(2) of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act (33 U.S.C. 1319(c)(2)) is amended, in the matter following subparagraph (B)—

paragraph.text: by striking $5,000 and inserting $25,000 (subject to adjustments under this paragraph);
by striking $50,000 and inserting $250,000 (subject to adjustments under this paragraph);
by striking $100,000 and inserting $500,000 (subject to adjustments under this paragraph); and

by adding at the end the following: The Administrator shall annually adjust the maximum penalties under this paragraph by the percentage (if any) by which the Consumer Price Index for all-urban consumers published by the Department of Labor for the month of October preceding the date of the adjustment exceeds such Consumer Price Index for the month of October in the preceding year, and shall publish each such adjustment in the Federal Register. An adjustment shall apply only with regard to a violation committed after the date of such publication..
